_comment: M9-T5 (+M9-T6's fixture 07): per-fixture max allowed % of differing pixels (PliegoOracle\PixelDiff, /out/NN-diff.png). Calibrated HONESTLY against a real local run (node+Chromium+Ghostscript all available) -- see tools/oracle's task-5-report.md (01-06) and task-6-report.md (07) for the measured %, per-fixture root cause (font ascent/leading metric nuances, table auto/fixed column-width algorithm, border-collapse approximation, and for 07: Bootstrap's fluid calc(rem + vw) heading font-sizes falling back to the plain UA h1/h2/h3 default -- vw has no meaning in a print engine, see that fixture's own <style> and the M9 README section for the full writeup) and the exact margin applied on top of each measured value. NOT arbitrary round numbers.
